research_question.population: eligible workers in the analysis panel

sources.provenance: analysis data built from raw survey extracts with a checked sample log

sample_construction: Keep workers observed before and after first eligibility.
Drop observations with missing treatment, outcome, id, or time.
Record all exclusion counts in replication/sample_log.csv.
data.missing_data_policy: complete-case for required design columns, with sensitivity table for covariate imputation

assumptions: parallel trends after conditioning on age, education, tenure, unit fixed effects, and year fixed effects
no anticipation before the first treatment year
stable unit treatment value within the worker-year panel
identification.estimating_equation: wage_it = alpha_i + lambda_t + beta training_it + X_it gamma + epsilon_it

estimators.name: twfe_sensitivity
estimators.formula: wage ~ training + age + edu + tenure | worker_id + year

reproducibility.data_provenance: Attach the StatsPAI MCP data_provenance block to every result handle.

external_parity: Run an R did::att_gt or Stata csdid spot check when the external engine is configured.
validation.failure_policy: Stop on missing provenance, unidentified design choices, or failing gates.
